final:
module RefModule(
  input CLK,
  input D,
  input R,
  input S,
  output reg Q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or negedge R or negedge S or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (!R) begin
      Q <= 1'b0;
    end else if (!S) begin
      Q <= 1'b1;
    end else begin
      Q <= D;
    end
  end

endmodule
